agents.name: Customer Support
agents.description: Advanced customer support agent — resolves tickets, processes refunds, applies credits, changes plans, and handles escalations. Includes case wrap-up with auto-classification, CRM updates, and satisfaction follow-ups. Designed for Tier 2 support where the frontline agent has already triaged.

tools.description: Look up a customer by name, email, phone, or customer ID. Returns profile, account details, and recent activity.
Update a customer record in the CRM. Can update plan, status, notes, tags, or custom fields. Provide the record ID from a previous lookup.
Create a support ticket or case in the CRM with priority, category, and description. Links to a customer record.
Search CRM contacts by name, company, email, or phone. Returns matching contact list.
Process a refund for a customer. Amounts over $100 require manager approval. Returns refund ID and status.
Apply a goodwill credit to a customer
Change a customer
Tool

Search the full knowledge base for information relevant to a customer question. Use this when kb/quick-answers returns no match. Returns the most relevant passages from company documentation, policies, FAQs, service details, and procedures.

Check if a customer question matches a frequently asked question with a pre-cached answer. Returns instant responses for common questions (hours, pricing, policies, etc.) without needing a full knowledge base search. If no match, returns null so you should fall back to kb/search-knowledge-base.
Send an email to a customer, lead, or team member. Supports plain text and HTML body. Requires SMTP configuration in environment variables (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS) or SENDGRID_API_KEY.
Calculate a customer health score (0-100) based on ticket frequency, sentiment, usage trends, and NPS. Identifies at-risk customers and provides recommended actions for account management.
Analyze recent support tickets to identify common themes and issues. Groups tickets by topic, severity, and trend to surface product gaps and customer pain points.
Intelligently determine whether a support ticket should be escalated. Considers customer lifetime value, sentiment, complexity, and context to recommend escalation path and priority level.
Automatically trigger and manage customer satisfaction surveys after service interactions. Analyzes responses, identifies trends, and flags accounts needing attention.
Manage and optimize the customer self-service knowledge base. Identifies content gaps from ticket analysis, suggests new articles, tracks deflection rates, and recommends improvements.

agents.name: Lead Qualifier
agents.description: Autonomous lead qualification agent — researches, scores, and routes inbound leads using BANT criteria. Enriches leads from 6+ external data providers (Apollo, LinkedIn, PeopleDataLabs, FullContact, Twilio, Google Places) via waterfall enrichment. Calculates affluence/affordability scores to help small businesses prioritize leads worth their time and investment.

Qualify and score a lead using BANT criteria (Budget, Authority, Need, Timeline) plus firmographic data. Returns a score (0-100), qualification tier, routing recommendation, and detailed breakdown. Pass ALL known information about the lead.

Deep-enrich a lead by pulling all available CRM data: lead record, account info, related contacts (buying committee), activity history, and open opportunities. Returns a comprehensive 360-degree profile. Use this AFTER finding a lead to build a full picture before scoring.
